name: BACKROOM LOOP
short_description: Backroom Loop is a first-person psychological horror (entertainment) game. You are trapped in a familiar-feeling space, exploring and escaping… only to return to the start. Can you break free from the loop?
detailed_description:
Endless hallways. Uneasy silence. A loop you can't escape.

Backroom Loop is a first-person psychological horror exploration game.

You're trapped in a space that's both unfamiliar and strangely familiar.
No matter how hard you try to escape, you always end up back where you started.
Is there truly an exit to this never-ending loop?

About the Game:

Inspired by the internet myth "Backrooms" and the trending game "Exit 8",
Backroom Loop blends observation, memory, and puzzle-solving into a strange yet captivating experience.
Each run offers something new — unexpected changes hidden in familiar spaces.

Features:

  • Over 69 random events, making each playthrough unique

  • Relaxed pacing with no pressure — perfect for any mood

  • Occasional mild jump scares — stay alert to your surroundings

  • Supports checkpoints and autosaves — resume anytime

  • Complete game experience lasts around 15–60 minutes — short yet enjoyable

Tips:

The game is full of hidden secrets and subtle details.
Don’t rush to the ending — you might find something oddly familiar around the next corner.
